$schema_hint: Maps each media type to the Wikidata P31 classes that identify work-level vs edition-level entities. Consumed by ReconciliationAdapter.BuildStage2Request via EditionPivotConfiguration. prefer_edition=true means the Stage 2 resolver walks P747 from the work to find a preferred edition. Media types not listed here (movies, tv, comics, podcasts) return no pivot rule and are resolved at the work level.
